zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多，关注关键支撑与阻力
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD价格维持在2149.82附近，较24小时波动幅度有限，仅0.21%，显示短线市场情绪偏稳。价格略高于20日简单移动平均线SMA(20) 2143.59，说明多头略占优势，但整体趋势仍以震荡为主，需警惕快速回撤的可能性。  

MACD指标当前为-14.02，尽管信号线不可用，但负值表明空头动能存在压力，多头尚未完全接管。若MACD转正并形成金叉，将是短期上涨的重要信号。投资者应关注指标变化，结合价格行为判断进场时机。  

技术支撑位首先关注SMA(20)附近2143水平，其下方若跌破2140则可能触发进一步下探。阻力位在日内高点2157附近，如能稳突破该区域，则上行空间可拓展至2165-2170区域。支撑和阻力区间为短线交易提供明确参考。  

综合来看，短线可偏向多头布局，建议低位逢低轻仓入场，止损可设在2140下方。若价格未能有效突破阻力，宜谨慎持仓或考虑短期离场。中线投资者可等待MACD金叉及RSI确认后再加仓，以降低波动风险并提高胜率。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is showing modest stability around the $2150 level, with recent price action confined between $2143.98 and $2157.12. The market appears to be in a short-term consolidation phase, hovering near its 20-period simple moving average at $2143.59. This suggests that buyers and sellers are currently in relative equilibrium, with momentum lacking strong directional bias. Observing this range-bound movement can help traders anticipate potential breakouts or breakdowns as volatility increases.  

Although the RSI is unavailable, the MACD reading of -14.02 indicates that bearish momentum is still slightly dominant despite the small 0.21% price gain in the last 24 hours. The negative MACD implies that Ethereum could face some near-term selling pressure if upward momentum fails to build. Traders should monitor whether the MACD begins to converge toward the signal line, as a crossover could indicate a shift toward bullish momentum, offering potential entry points for swing trades.  

Immediate support is found near $2143, corresponding closely with the 20-period SMA, which may act as a short-term floor in case of retracement. Resistance is visible at $2157, marking the recent daily high. A sustained break above this level could open the way to test $2170-$2180 as the next psychological resistance zone. Conversely, a breakdown below $2140 could expose Ethereum to lower levels around $2125, signaling caution for buyers.  

For trading strategy, conservative traders might consider waiting for a clear breakout above $2157 before initiating long positions, using stop-losses just below $2140. More aggressive traders could attempt range-bound trades between support and resistance, keeping a tight risk management approach due to the potential for sudden volatility. Monitoring MACD convergence and SMA alignment will be critical to confirm trend shifts and avoid false signals in this consolidating market.  

Word count: 273
